ddls:
CREATE TABLE "process_models" (
  "process_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process model */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the process model was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the process model was last modified */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the process model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the process model (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "process_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process model the version belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "process_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process model the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., service call, user task) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "input_section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input section for the activity */,
  "output_section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the output section for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_process_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_model_id") REFERENCES process_models ("process_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "process_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process model the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., input properties, output properties) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_process_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_model_id") REFERENCES process_models ("process_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_properties" (
  "data_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data property */,
  "process_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process model the data property belongs to */,
  "data_property_name" TEXT /* Name of the data property */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the data property (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data property */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the data property belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_properties_process_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_model_id") REFERENCES process_models ("process_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the link belongs to */,
  "source_or_target" TEXT /* Indicates whether the link is a source or target */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., sequence flow, message flow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_endpoints" (
  "link_endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link endpoint */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the link the endpoint belongs to */,
  "endpoint_type" TEXT /* Type of endpoint (e.g., section property, data column) */,
  "endpoint_value" TEXT /* Value of the endpoint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the endpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_link_endpoints_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES links ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, process owner) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the user is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_assignments_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_instances" (
  "process_instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process instance */,
  "process_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process model the instance belongs to */,
  "instance_data" TEXT /* Instance data for the process */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the process instance started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the process instance ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the process instance (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_instances_process_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_model_id") REFERENCES process_models ("process_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_instances" (
  "activity_instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity instance */,
  "process_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process instance the activity instance belongs to */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the instance belongs to */,
  "instance_data" TEXT /* Instance data for the activity */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the activity instance started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the activity instance ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity instance (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_instances_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_instances_process_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_instance_id") REFERENCES process_instances ("process_instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "process_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process instance the analytics record belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., execution time, success rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the analytics record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_process_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_instance_id") REFERENCES process_instances ("process_instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "process_instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process instance the log entry belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., process start, activity completion) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_process_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_instance_id") REFERENCES process_instances ("process_instance_id")
)
